name: Milk
description: Family has 3 school going children and 1 daughter still attending preschool. Mother is undergoing a divorce currently (with father not supporting financially and not residing together) and she recently lost her job due to her caregiving demands of her children. She has recently managed to find a job but requires some time to stabilise her finances. In the meantime, she would require help in milk as she tries to stabilise her finances. Thank you.

name: Fan
description: Needy family of 4, including two elderly in their 80s, requires a standing fan in this hot weather.

contact.org: SACS Anglican Cluster Operator @ Jurong East
contact.name: Koh Leong Foo

passiton.name: Fan & Aircooler
passiton.description:
Fan with air cooler feature - we have not tried air cooler. It has a tank to put water and 2 ice blocks (included). Bought in China, menu is in Chinese but I can write in English and tape it to the top for easy reference. 

Can WhatsApp me for more details and to arrange drop off. 

Will send to VWO / needy living in Bedok, Tampines, Changi or Ang Mo Kio area.
passiton.location: Bayshore, Bedok, Chai Chee, Eastwood, Kew Drive, Upper East Coast
